elements.name: Bounded repair approved
elements.documentation: Begin from the operator-approved boundary: proportional diagram rejection, one correction retry, and preserved authorship and single-writer semantics.

elements.name: Bound maintainer recovery
elements.documentation: Replace the all-or-nothing diagram failure rule with mechanical bundle rejection, a one-retry ceiling, and an evidence-preserving stop while retaining reset behavior for incomplete runs and newer main.

elements.name: Ground diagram acceptance
elements.documentation: Make the generator trace semantic flow targets and judge actual embed readability with linked full resolution; aspect ratio alone is not a failure.

elements.name: Update focused checks
elements.documentation: Update wrapper assertions and validate the edited Skill so the intended prompt and methodology contract are observed mechanically where possible.

elements.name: Run local checks
elements.documentation: Run focused wrapper tests, shell syntax and lint, Skill validation, plan generation checks, and git diff checks.

elements.name: Local checks green?
elements.documentation: Decide whether every applicable local Check passes against the intended Change.

elements.name: Fix in-scope failures
elements.documentation: Correct only failures caused by the agreed Change and rerun the affected local Checks.

elements.name: Independent review
elements.documentation: Give the exact verified working-tree delta to one fresh read-only reviewer for material correctness, intent, reliability, and standards findings.

elements.name: Confirmed findings?
elements.documentation: Verify reviewer findings against the Repository and decide whether any confirmed in-scope finding remains.

elements.name: Fix confirmed findings
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest causal correction for each confirmed in-scope finding, rerun affected Checks, and send the exact delta back through review.

elements.name: Commit green change
elements.documentation: Commit only the reviewed, locally green Task, policy, prompt, test, and plan artifacts.

elements.name: Push and open PR
elements.documentation: Push the green commit and open one pull request carrying Task intent and Check evidence.

elements.name: Run GitHub checks
elements.documentation: Observe all applicable final GitHub-side Checks on the pull request.

elements.name: Pull request green?
elements.documentation: Decide whether the pull request is open, mergeable, unmerged, and all applicable Checks are green.

elements.name: Fix PR failures
elements.documentation: Correct an in-scope pull-request failure in the same Change, then repeat local verification and independent review.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: End planned execution with the bounded-retry Change green in its pull request and ready for finalization and operator handoff.

flows.documentation: The approved outcome first changes the policy that creates the destructive loop.
Align internal generation guidance with the maintainer's material acceptance boundary.
Changed wrapper guidance requires focused regression assertions.
Execute the Checks after the coherent implementation and regression-test slice is complete.
Evaluate the fresh local Check results.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: A local failure returns to the smallest in-scope correction.
Rerun every Check affected by the correction.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: A locally green non-trivial Change proceeds to mandatory independent review before commit or publication.
The owning agent verifies the reviewer's returned findings against Repository evidence.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: Confirmed in-scope findings receive the smallest causal correction.
A review fix returns through affected Checks and fresh exact-delta review before commit.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: Only a reviewed Change with no confirmed findings may be committed.
Push the green commit and create its one pull request.
The published Change must pass applicable GitHub-side Checks.
Evaluate final pull-request state and Check results.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: An in-scope pull-request failure remains work in the same Change.
A PR-side correction returns through local verification and independent review before republishing.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: A green, open, unmerged pull request reaches the plan boundary for finalization and operator handoff.
